feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Joys of Fatherhood
entry.summary:
Author: K15n

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,277Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: "Theo what do your grown ups do for work?" Theo smiles, fidgeting slightly, "My Buck goes to a special house and cooks yummy food for our family and then he helps save people. He's brave like me." Buck watches in confusion as Theo continues to speak. "My Eddie helps people feel better. He puts big bandaids on people's booboos and has a special bag that fixes people. Like Doc McStuffins!" Theo pauses thinking for a moment, "He keeps my Buck safe too." Or when Theo's preschool celebrates father's day Buck realizes the role Eddie holds in Theo's life

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: If I Lay Here
entry.summary:
Author: tohsokrim

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,503Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 0

Summary: Eddie’s throat tightened. “I know, Buck, but you gotta keep your eyes open for me.” He said sternly. Buck smiled softly before humming to himself. “You’ve ‘ways b’n bossy when you're scared.”   OR - Eddie wakes up trapped beneath the rubble, believing he's alone. Until he spots Buck barely conscious and impaled by a piece of rebar. OR - A building collapse traps our favourite boys.

entry.title: Skin of Earth
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,188Chapters: 4/30Kudos: 46

Summary: It has been five months since the events at the reservoir, and life finally seems to have settled into a new norm for Buck and Eddie. Buck is thriving, as he learns to harness the potential in his new abilities, and Eddie as always is right by his side. At home, their bond is flourishing, as they use their down time to truly embrace being a family, while the chaos of work is keeping them on their toes, as the 118 officially embrace their advanced station status. All in all, life is pretty perfect. So what happens when an unwanted phone call, an unexpected opportunity, and an unprecedented storm suddenly upend everything, and set them on a path they never could have imagined. Along with new friends they meet along the way, join Buck and Eddie as they explore the magical world of the elements, and the bonds that tie them to it. - NOTE: It is strongly recommended that you read 'Part 1: Soul of Water' before starting this fic. Much of the world building, and plot points, may not make much sense otherwise.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: There's No You Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,425Chapters: 19/30Kudos: 47

Summary: “Where are you driving from?” Eddie asked, his mouth moving before he could stop it, his brain deciding that awkward small talk was infinitely safer than just standing there vibrating with nervous energy. “East,” the guy replied with a casual, fluid roll of his broad shoulders. “Farther than I wanted to be, honestly. And definitely longer than I originally planned.” Before the army, before Los Angeles, and long before the 118, there was a dusty gas station on the edge of El Paso, a broken-down Jeep with Pennsylvania plates, and a stranger named Evan. For years, they were each other's entire world, surviving basic training, AIT, and a grueling deployment side-by-side. But a devastating wave of silence and a massive misunderstanding tore them apart, leaving behind a deep, soul-cutting ache and a history neither of them ever truly moved on from. Now, the past has finally caught up to the present. Standing under the harsh fluorescent lights of Station 118, Eddie and Evan are forced to navigate the wreckage of the life they left behind—and the terrifying truth of everything they never stopped running from.

entry.title: Highway to HOA Hell
entry.summary:
Author: shallythunder

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,815Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 8

Summary: The supplies were laid out just as neatly as Bob’s flower beds, everything in straight lines, gloves piled smartly, and plywood tables at right angles to each other to make for an organized work area. It was the most precise meth lab Buck had ever seen. OR It starts with a simple fence. But soon Buck finds the president of Eddie's Home Owner's Association running a meth lab out of his garage. The 118 is on it.

entry.title: Look at you go, crossin' state lines with your shadow
entry.summary:
Author: Sam_Stew

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,282Chapters: 7/25Kudos: 256

Summary: Buck glances down again, seeing yet again another unknown unknown number calling him, "I'll be right back," he explains, jutting his thumb back before rushing towards the bunk rooms to answer the call. "Is this Evan Buckley?" "Yes, this is he, is this about Connor again?" "Yes, now I am not the last person you will here with about this part of the will," he explains, "and you can wave your rights to Theo-" "Theo?" Buck asks "Yes, Theo Spencer he's left in your care in case of accident," – Or after Eddie leaves LA Buck gets a call from a lawyer - Or or 8B and S9 with Bobby and Theo

entry.title: hurts so good
entry.summary:
Author: harrypotterstyles4

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,823Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: Where the fuck do they even go from here? They’re still in Buck’s kitchen, pressed against the counter near the fridge. Typical. Oh so fucking typical for them. Yet entirely novel. Entirely brave in a way Eddie had never intended to be tonight. Nor ever. This was a secret he had been planning to take to the grave with him. Something Buck would never know so he would stay free. Stay uncomplicated. Stay Buck. Where they go from here, apparently, is Buck canting his hips forward. Grinding against thin air and making the most broken, wrecked noise. “Eddie.” That’s all it takes. A man can only have so much self control, and Eddie has done his penance having way too much his entire life.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: We didn't start the fire (Hildy did)
entry.summary:
Author: Promise_Moon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,346Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: But what would happen on a peaceful, sunny, and quiet day like today? Where it would feel nice to bask in the sun and nap all afternoon. Unlike how Eddie’s dream is going right now, where it feels like he’s burning up. Since all he sees around him is a beach with his three boys and the sun beating down on them. And without an umbrella stuck into the sand, it feels so fucking hot.The sun beating down feels a bit too hot. Eddie wakes up with a jolt to see smoke dance across his vision. He looks around to see the start of flames going across the fireplace in a spot that does not hold fire normally. Realizing what’s happening, Eddie abruptly gets up and takes out his phone, dialing 9-1-1 as he goes to wake up Chris and Theo.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 248,819Chapters: 61/?Kudos: 157

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: is it over now?
entry.summary:
Author: aftermathbaby

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,855Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 56

Summary: On the way back from a call, Buck is abducted and brutally assaulted. The aftermath is messy: Buck insists he’s fine (he's not), Eddie is wracked with guilt (predictably), and Christopher knows way too much (as usual). As the 118 rallies around them, everyone has to grapple with the fallout of the violence and what it means for Buck, for Buck and Eddie, and for themselves.

entry.title: Change Over Time
entry.summary:
Author: Pyrus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,647Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 1,545

Summary: Feeling like the 118 would never take him back, wouldn't try to understand why he started the lawsuit, would only see him as exhausting, Buck decided that it was time for a change. Feeling like he had no other choice, Buck took the money and decided to start over. Maybe the umpteenth time's the charm. Years later, running into the ghosts of his past while starting his new job, will he be able to get over the pain?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I got tired of being strong
entry.summary:
Author: LovemeanywayBandE

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,113Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 95

Summary: So he had won, he returned, he smiled and joked and was sunshine and silliness, he was the person everyone needed him to be and it changed depending on who it was. He didn’t share the truth about how he was struggling with more than just the emotional toll of the last few months because that would strain the relationships he worked so hard to get back. The thing that kept him awake at night alongside all his other worries was the realisation that this family that he held so dear that he had wanted so badly, no longer felt a permanent part of his life, He didn’t trust it anymore But no matter how many times he told himself he was happy and it was all ok, he couldn’t ignore the black pit inside of him that he was slowly drowning in that whispered you are not wanted, no one really cares, you are unlovable, you are exhausting. Post law suit everything is getting back to normal .everyone has forgiven Buck and he is back where he belongs. So why does he feel so broken?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Drunk Google Search
entry.summary:
Author: who_is_she_again_D

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,339Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Eddie is so damn bored. Buck is a dad now and has no more time for Eddie so naturally, Eddie falls downs a rabbit hole, being gay quizzes.

entry.title: This god damn chair
entry.summary:
Author: Kxk

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,839Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Eddie had a monumental day, with a hidden bag, some slime, and a therapy appontment. Not really in that order. But at the same time?
